name: ai-zippy/cotop-product-brands
title: CO-TOP Product Brands
description: CO-TOP product brand grid for Quartz or Solid Surface sections.

default.label: Premium Quartz
default.name: Hanstone Quartz
default.desc: A globally recognised quartz brand offering 90+ colours with consistent pattern and superior resistance to scratches, stains, and heat. Ideal for kitchen countertops and bathroom vanities.

default.label: Value Quartz
default.name: Cresto Quartz
default.desc: An accessible yet premium quartz range offering excellent durability and a wide colour palette. Delivers exceptional value without compromising on performance or aesthetics.

default.label: Premium Solid Surface
default.name: Hanex Solid Surface
default.desc: One of Korea's most trusted solid surface brands. Hanex offers exceptional thermoformability - curved shapes, seamless joins, and integrated sink bowls. Perfect for reception counters, vanities, and bespoke furniture.

default.label: Value Solid Surface
default.name: Cresto Solid Surface
default.desc: A versatile solid surface range that balances cost-effectiveness with quality. Delivers consistent performance across residential and light commercial applications.
